content.text:
I don't have access to real-time information or the ability to check current times in different locations. To get the current time in London, you could:

- Check your computer's clock and add/subtract hours (London is GMT/UTC in winter, BST/UTC+1 in summer)
- Search "time in London" on Google
- Use your phone's world clock feature
- Check a time zone website like timeanddate.com
